CASE STUDY

How Relay.so Cut Content Production by 90%

From 12-hour design sprints to 60-second generation

SLIDEFORGE PROOF STACKING
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

The Bottleneck

PROBLEM

Relay.so's 4-person marketing team was spending 48 hours per week on carousel creation alone. Each Instagram campaign required 8-12 hand-crafted slides, custom illustrations, and multiple revision cycles.

SOLUTION

Deployed Nexus with the 'product_showcase' preset. Content leads write a one-paragraph brief and Nexus generates the full carousel with theme-consistent slides.

KEY IMPACT & PROOF
48hrs/week → 3hrs/week  •  Zero design revisions  •  Consistent brand voice
SLIDEFORGE PROOF STACKING
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

Before & After

BEFORE

Before Nexus: 48 hours/week on carousel design. 3 revision rounds per campaign. Inconsistent visual quality between team members.

→
AFTER

After Nexus: 3 hours/week on review and publishing. 0 revision rounds. Pixel-perfect consistency every time.

Time Reduction
93.7%
SLIDEFORGE PROOF STACKING
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

Relay.so Marketing Team

PROBLEM

Scale Instagram content from 2 campaigns/month to daily posting without hiring designers.

SOLUTION

Nexus generates campaign carousels from product briefs. Team reviews, tweaks copy, and publishes.

KEY IMPACT & PROOF
Content Output  •  Annual Savings
SLIDEFORGE PROOF STACKING
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

“The ROI was obvious in week one. We went from dreading content deadlines to shipping carousels before lunch.”

Sarah Kim
Design Lead, Relay.so
SLIDEFORGE PROOF STACKING
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

Scaling Beyond Marketing

PROBLEM

Sales team wanted custom decks for every prospect. Design team was the bottleneck. Deals stalled waiting for collateral.

SOLUTION

Sales reps use Nexus CLI to generate prospect-specific carousels from CRM data. No design team involvement needed.

KEY IMPACT & PROOF
Self-serve for sales  •  CRM data integration  •  Deal cycle -40%
SLIDEFORGE PROOF STACKING
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

Deal Collateral: Before vs After

BEFORE

Before: Sales requests design team 5 days before demo. Gets generic deck. Customizes 2 slides. Feels unprofessional.

→
AFTER

After: Sales runs nexus generate 30 min before demo. Gets prospect-specific carousel with their logo, data, and pain points.

Collateral Lead Time
5 days → 30 min
SLIDEFORGE PROOF STACKING
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

Relay.so Sales Team

PROBLEM

Close deals faster with personalized collateral without burdening the design team.

SOLUTION

Nexus CLI integrated into Salesforce workflow. Reps generate custom carousels from opportunity data.

KEY IMPACT & PROOF
Faster Close Rate  •  Higher Deal Size
SLIDEFORGE PROOF STACKING
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

“I generated a custom deck for a Fortune 500 prospect in the Uber to the meeting. We closed $200K that quarter.”

AE, Relay.so

From Cost Center to Revenue Driver

PROBLEM

Content team was seen as a cost center — necessary but slow. Leadership questioned whether the investment was justified.

SOLUTION

With Nexus, the content team now runs 3x more campaigns with the same headcount. Attribution shows content-driven pipeline grew 180%.

KEY IMPACT & PROOF
180% pipeline growth  •  3x campaign velocity  •  Content ROI positive in 30 days
SLIDEFORGE PROOF STACKING
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

The Transformation Story

BEFORE

Before: Content team: 4 people, 2 campaigns/month, seen as overhead. Budget scrutinized quarterly.

→
AFTER

After: Same 4 people, 60+ campaigns/month, content is top pipeline contributor. Budget doubled.

Pipeline Growth
180%
